<?php /** * Layout template file for Whoops's pretty error output. */ ?> <!DOCTYPE html><?php echo $preface; ?> <html> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow"/> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no"/> <title><?php echo $tpl->escape($page_title) ?></title> <style><?php echo $stylesheet ?></style> <style><?php echo $prismCss ?></style> </head> <body> <div class="Whoops container"> <div class="stack-container"> <?php $tpl->render($panel_left_outer) ?> <?php $tpl->render($panel_details_outer) ?> </div> </div> <script data-manual><?php echo $prismJs ?></script> <script><?php echo $zepto ?></script> <script><?php echo $clipboard ?></script> <script><?php echo $javascript ?></script> </body> </html>
